title: Product Catalog
description: Product catalog for LLM furniture placement. Valid at three levels: (1) per-product template — single-item products + profiles arrays, stored alongside vendor files in catalog/<item_no>/template.json; (2) merged template — concatenated products + profiles from all per-product templates, plan-independent; (3) finalized catalog — merged template + scale_px_per_m + footprints, plan-specific. If footprints are present, scale_px_per_m is required.

scale_px_per_m.description: Grid pixels per meter — matches the plan scale. Used by the pipeline for unit conversion, not by the LLM directly.

products.description: Factual product data sourced from the retailer.

profiles.description: Generated/curated product classifications for placement logic. Separated from products because these are system-generated, not factual source data.

tier.description: Placement priority. anchor: large structural pieces placed first (sofa, table, bed). accent: items placed relative to anchors (chairs, side tables). fill: decor and accessories placed last (vases, rugs, lighting).

categories.description: Functional categories for placement reasoning (e.g. seating, surface, storage, decor). Free-form strings.

tags.description: Style and vibe descriptors (e.g. japandi, cozy, minimal, organic, warm). Free-form strings.

footprints.description: CSS snippets defining each product's spatial footprint on the plan grid. Format: #i<item_no> { width: <px>; height: <px>; --elevation: <px>; /* <name> */ }. Width and height are the floor footprint; --elevation is object height above floor. All values in grid pixels (unitless).
